text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Do you think ghosts really exist?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Where can you go to find them? 
And must it really be at night…?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I heard that ghosts are people who have 
unfinished business in this world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I would like to speak to them and ask 
what it is that keeps them so passionately 
tied to our realm.
